title: Alphonsea ovata
intro: Alphonsea ovata, also known as the ovate Alphonsea, is a species of plant in the family Annonaceae, native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in the treatment of various diseases such as fever, cough, and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Alphonsea ovata include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Alphonsea ovata is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
